name: boundaries
description: Dr. Henry Cloud and Dr. John Townsend's classic guide to setting healthy boundaries in every area of life — understanding what you are responsible for, saying no to what drains you, and taking control of your time, energy, and relationships.
useCase: Setting healthy limits in relationships, overcoming guilt about saying no, recognizing boundary problems (compliant/avoidant/controller), applying the 10 Laws of Boundaries to family, friends, work, and self.
knownRisks: Explicitly Christian perspective — uses biblical references throughout
Some readers may find the tone prescriptive or moralistic
The Sherrie case study at the start is deliberately exaggerated for effect
The 10 Laws of Boundaries are conceptual frameworks, not clinical diagnoses
Some advice may be difficult to apply in abusive situations without professional support
